programs.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt
programs.desc: Judith and John fell in love by chance when he renovated her home; they got married and moved into a beautiful condo to live an urban lifestyle in Vancouver, but the condo life isn't giving them the family entertaining space they were each so used to; after a trip to Nova Scotia, they realized that is where they need to be, and now they are on the hunt for their forever home.

programs.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt
programs.desc: Susanna and Will have spent their entire relationship renovating and flipping homes; they have never lived in a home that is just for them; with their two boys out of the house, they have decided it's time to have the home they've always wanted.

programs.title: Lakefront Luxury
programs.desc: Rory and Karly dream of raising their kids in a house on the lake, and they're searching for their very first waterfront property; he likes modern and she wants rustic; will this couple come to a compromise, or will they need two lake houses?

programs.title: Lakefront Luxury
programs.desc: Don and Agnes visit lakefront properties in search of their forever home after retirement.

programs.title: Lakefront Luxury
programs.desc: Amanda and Joe are passionate about fitness and are searching for their dream home that has enough space for a home gym; during their search for a lakefront property, they come across a beautiful traditional home situated on five and a half acres.

programs.title: Lakefront Luxury
programs.desc: Praveeni and Sashien love the finer things in life, especially the opulent look of high-end hotels, and are currently seeking a lakefront property that embodies their travel lifestyle.
